title: Let Me Move ! (Extra) [BTW Addon]
description: Add new actions and animations to the game (e.g. crawling, swimming...)
body:
# Let Me Move ! (Extra) (BTW:CE Addon)

Implement new actions and animations allowing the player to move like never before !

It is an extension of the [<Let Me Move !>](https://modrinth.com/mod/let-me-move-!) addon

### Actions
- Swimming
- Crawling
- Crouching (below 1.5 blocks)
- Diving
- Wall Sliding
- Pull Up on wall
- Sky Dive
- Rolling
- Dashing

This addon is part of the [Dynamic Visuals Series](https://modrinth.com/collection/Lu0zyquD)

## Dependencies

- https://modrinth.com/mod/btwce
- https://modrinth.com/mod/dranimation-lib
- https://modrinth.com/mod/let-me-move-!

## Found a bug or have suggestions ?
https://github.com/BTW-Community/Dynamic-Visuals-Series/issues

## Download
https://modrinth.com/project/let-me-move-!-(extra)/versions
